title: CocoIndex daemon resilience
description: Five interacting bugs in mcp-coco-index daemon caused leaked-zombie processes and CPU-spinning log spam. Five iterations of deep research expanded the surface from 2 surface bugs to a 7-patch remediation plus three formally-refuted hypotheses (LMDB, worker reaping, backlog starvation). The leak mechanism is the unconditional socket-unlink at daemon startup combined with a non-atomic start_daemon. The CPU spike is 90 percent double logger.exception per disconnect across 6 unsafe send_bytes sites. Plan: 7 patches across client.py + daemon.py, 13 tasks, 21 findings (13 P0, 4 P1, 4 P2), severance event Apr 27 17:08:49 (NOT May 1 as initial spec hypothesized).
